published_prior_art.cite: Kuroki2013 derives sharp surrogate-endpoint bounds; this theorem is a routine bounded-mixture lower envelope, not the full published sharp-bound problem.

repo_prior_art.cite: Closest are pid_long_term_surrogate_v1 finite noisy-proxy sign ambiguity, pid_ordinal_principal_strata_v1 ordinal compatibility facets, and pid_collider_bias_sharp_v1 finite binary threshold machinery; none states this responder-stratum surrogate threshold.

published_prior_art.cite: YinLiuGengLuo2020 optimal observed-data exclusion criteria and MaYinLiuGeng2021 individual surrogate paradox are closer than acknowledged; responder-stratum phase frontier may be distinct but is not yet shown to strictly tighten them.
ChenGengJia2007 and VanderWeele2013 study average/qualitative surrogate-paradox sign criteria; this scalar threshold is a direct consequence of Conjecture 1 rather than independent flagship novelty.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The claim that the result is a strict tightening of YinLiuGengLuo2020 is not established: that paper's optimality claim already says failed criteria admit a surrogate-paradox DGP generating the same observed data, so this must be framed as a responder-stratum refinement unless a formal strict-containment comparison is added.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship generic open-class claim lacks a nondegenerate concrete witness: Exhibit 9.1 is a boundary table with deterministic endpoint potentials and zero observed cells, so tier=field below novelty_target=flagship until a genuinely interior endpoint-compatible table is exhibited.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The proposal defines C_ec(P,gamma) as a class of latent feasible laws but Assumption endpoint-compatible says the observed law P belongs to it; the statement also uses undefined 'baseline cell' terminology.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption endpoint-compatible includes 'no additional observed-endpoint inequality tightening the algebraic lower bound L_R', which builds the sharpness conclusion into the hypothesis rather than deriving it from independent mixture/rank conditions.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace Assumption endpoint-compatible with independent observable or primitive finite-mixture inequalities, then prove rather than assume that no endpoint-table constraint tightens L_R.

Add a fully interior finite table with all positive relevant endpoint risks and observed cells, compute L_R and gamma_star from the table, and verify the rank/slack conditions supporting the open-neighborhood claim.

Add a formal comparator paragraph against YinLiuGengLuo2020 showing whether the proposed responder-stratum frontier is a strict refinement, an inclusion-side construction, or an orthogonal principal-stratum diagnostic.

recommended_next_step: Revise Conjecture 1 around independent endpoint-compatibility conditions and an interior witness; otherwise the kernel remains field-tier and below the flagship floor.
